mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.vip_rank_code as vipRankCode, t.vip_rank_name as vipRankName, t.vip_grade_codes as vipGradeCodes, (select vip_grade_name from vip_grade where vip_grade_code = SUBSTRING_INDEX( t.vip_grade_codes, ',', 1 )) AS minGrade, (select vip_grade_name from vip_grade where vip_grade_code = SUBSTRING_INDEX( t.vip_grade_codes, ',', -1 )) as maxGrade, t.vip_icon as vipIcon, t.remark as remark FROM site_vip_rank t where t.site_code = #{siteCode}
